evidence.claim: The user has an available balance and a daily withdrawal limit.
evidence.fact: Users cannot take out more money than they have in the account or more than the prescribed one-thousand daily withdrawal limit.
evidence.user_story_span: available balance and daily withdrawal limit
evidence.fact_span: take out more money than they have in the account or more than the prescribed one-thousand daily withdrawal limit

evidence.claim: The system validates that the transaction amount does not exceed the available balance.
evidence.fact: The system ensures the balance is unchanged after a failed withdrawal.
evidence.user_story_span: validates that the transaction amount does not exceed the available balance
evidence.fact_span: ensures the balance is unchanged after a failed withdrawal

evidence.claim: The system respects daily withdrawal limits for transactions.
evidence.fact: The system declines withdrawals exceeding the daily limit of 1000 per calendar day.
evidence.user_story_span: tracks daily withdrawal totals per user
evidence.fact_span: declines withdrawals exceeding the daily limit of 1000 per calendar day

evidence.claim: The system respects the available balance for transactions.
evidence.fact: The system declines withdrawals exceeding the account balance.
evidence.fact_span: declines withdrawals exceeding the account balance

evidence.claim: If either check fails, the transaction is denied.
evidence.fact: When a withdrawal request would violate either the account balance constraint or the daily quota, the operation is denied entirely.
evidence.user_story_span: if either check fails, the transaction is denied
evidence.fact_span: would violate either the account balance constraint or the daily quota, the operation is denied entirely

evidence.fact: A user must present their bank card and enter their secret code to begin any cash withdrawal operation.
evidence.fact_span: user must present their bank card and enter their secret code to begin any cash withdrawal operation
